task_completion.description: Log in to the Magento Admin panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Magento Admin login screen being filled with credentials or the Magento Admin dashboard loaded.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Import section in Magento
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Import' page in Magento (usually found under System -> Import), with 'Products' selected as the Entity Type.

task_completion.description: Select the correct supplier CSV file for upload
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file input field populated with 'supplier_kitchenware_catalog.csv' from the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: Check the CSV data for validity before importing
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Check Data' button being clicked and a validation success message such as 'File is valid! To start import process press Import button'.
Screenshots show a success message indicating the import is complete, such as 'Import successfully done'.

task_completion.description: Verify the imported products appear in the Magento catalog
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Catalog -> Products grid containing the newly imported 'KITCHEN-' SKUs (e.g., KITCHEN-CF01, KITCHEN-KN01) with correct prices and quantities.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento web interface to perform the import
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser navigating the Magento admin panel, rather than terminal commands executing database scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent used the bulk import tool rather than manually creating products
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the System -> Import page being used, rather than the 'Add Product' form being filled out 12 separate times.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the exact CSV file specified in the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The file selection dialog or input field must explicitly show 'supplier_kitchenware_catalog.csv' being uploaded, not a newly created or renamed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file to import is located at /home/ga/Documents/supplier_kitchenware_catalog.csv. It contains exactly 12 products with SKUs: KITCHEN-CF01, KITCHEN-KN01, KITCHEN-CB01, KITCHEN-MP01, KITCHEN-BL01, KITCHEN-TK01, KITCHEN-MS01, KITCHEN-SP01, KITCHEN-CS01, KITCHEN-RC01, KITCHEN-TP01, KITCHEN-WK01. Prices range from $18.99 to $149.99 and quantities range from 40 to 250. The VLM should verify that the bulk import tool was used and that these specific SKUs appear in the catalog grid after import.
